title: A mixed-methods protocol to explore psychological distress and psychosocial needs along the continuum of CKD care- a single healthcare network.
notes: Mixed-methods protocol for CKD psychological distress in Canada. Canadian (Quebec). Protocol without results, not pharma RCT.

title: The Canadian Network for Mood and Anxiety Treatments Task Force Recommendations for the Use of Probiotics, Prebiotics, Synbiotics, and Fecal Microbiota Transplants in Adults With Major Depressive Disorder: Recommandations du Groupe de travail du Réseau canadien pour le traitement des troubles de l'humeur et de l'anxiété (Canadian Network for Mood and Anxiety Treatments, CANMAT) concernant l'utilisation des probiotiques, des prébiotiques, des symbiotiques et de la transplantation de microbiote fécal chez les adultes atteints de trouble dépressif majeur.
notes: CANMAT task force recommendations for probiotics in MDD. Canadian. But review/guideline, not RCT.

title: Is multiple sclerosis-related depression different from depression in general? The data for and against.
notes: Review of MS-related depression. Canadian co-author (Freedman). Review, not RCT.

title: Efficacy and safety of zuranolone in Japanese adults with major depressive disorder: A double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled, Phase 3 clinical trial.
notes: RCT of zuranolone for MDD in Japan. Pharma for MDD but not Canadian.

title: Drug repurposing for Alzheimer's disease: a Delphi consensus and stakeholder consultation.
notes: Delphi consensus on drug repurposing for AD. Canadian co-author (Bhatt). Not RCT.

title: Effect of upper-limb robot-assisted therapy combined with pneumatic gloves on upper limb function in young and middle-aged stroke patients: a pilot randomized controlled trial.
notes: Pilot RCT of robot-assisted therapy for stroke in China. Non-pharma, not Canadian.

title: Screening cognitive decline in older adults using umami hypogeusia and oral diadochokinesis: a cross-sectional study.
notes: Cross-sectional study of taste/oral function and cognitive decline in Japan. Not RCT, not pharma, not Canadian.

title: Effects of individualized rTMS on functional connectivity related to the default mode network and frontal-parietal network in major depressive disorder: exploratory analysis of a randomized controlled trial.
notes: Exploratory analysis of rTMS RCT for MDD in China. Non-pharma, not Canadian.

title: Effects of electroacupuncture synchronised with motor imagery training on upper limb motor recovery and neural mechanisms in ischaemic stroke: protocol for a single-centre, randomised controlled trial.
notes: Protocol for electroacupuncture + motor imagery RCT for stroke in China. Protocol without results, non-pharma, not Canadian.

title: Cognitive-behavioral Therapy for Schizophrenia: A Bibliometric and Scientometric Study of Global Evidence, Gaps, and Emerging Themes.
notes: Bibliometric study of CBT for schizophrenia. Not RCT, not pharma.

title: Efficacy of intranasal esketamine versus rTMS for treatment-resistant depression: analysis of individual participant data from two clinical trials.
notes: Secondary analysis comparing esketamine vs rTMS for TRD using IPD from two trials including Canadian THREE-D trial. Secondary analysis excluded.

title: Noninferiority Randomized Clinical Trial Comparing Three Delivery Formats of a Rehabilitation Intervention to Reduce Fatigue Among Individuals With Multiple Sclerosis.
notes: Noninferiority RCT of fatigue rehabilitation delivery formats for MS in US. Non-pharma, not Canadian.

title: Predictors of Psychiatric Emergency Department Visits Following Inpatient Discharge: Secondary Analysis of a Stepped-Wedge Cluster Randomized Trial.
notes: Secondary analysis of stepped-wedge RCT on predictors of psychiatric ED visits in Alberta, Canada. Canadian. But secondary analysis, not pharma.

title: Association between hemoglobin levels and mild cognitive impairment in generally healthy European community-dwelling older adults: a 3-year prospective analysis of the DO-HEALTH trial.
notes: Observational analysis of hemoglobin and MCI from DO-HEALTH trial in Europe. Not RCT, not MH pharma, not Canadian.

title: Targeting PTSD with ultramicronized palmitoylethanolamide: Results from a randomized trial integrating pharmacotherapy and cognitive behavioral therapy.
notes: RCT of palmitoylethanolamide + CBT for PTSD in Italy. Not Canadian.

title: Impact of treatment credibility and expectancy on cognitive behavioral therapy for insomnia outcomes among cancer survivors.
notes: Secondary analysis of CBT-I credibility/expectancy in cancer survivors. Canadian authors. But secondary analysis, non-pharma.

title: Psychometric evaluation of the Ontario Child Health Study Emotional Behavioural Scales (OCHS-EBS) in children and youth from an outpatient mental health setting.
notes: Psychometric evaluation of OCHS-EBS in Ontario, Canada. Canadian. But not RCT, not pharma, validation study.
